hub_subtitle: Business English from the ground up -- your work, your team, your routine

lesson.menu_desc: Talking about what you did last week -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 5 -- Last Week at Work -- Talking About the Past
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Danilo Febba | Aula 5 -- Last Week at Work

listenings.text: Hi team, this is your weekly recap. Last week was a busy one, so let me tell you what we did. On Monday, we planned the new sprint together. On Tuesday, I fixed two bugs in the data pipeline, and Sofia tested the new feature. On Wednesday, we reviewed the code and solved a big problem with the reports. On Thursday, I organized all the project files. And on Friday, we finished everything and delivered the project on time. Great job, everyone. We worked hard, and we reached our goal. Have a great weekend, and see you on Monday!
